prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4269名、4459名、4959名、1843名、1031名。2021–2023年位次在4269–4959名区间波动，整体后移约700名；202                        4年起因选科要求调整为"物理、化学(2科必选)"，报考门槛大幅提高，位次跃升至1843名；2025年进一步前移至1031名，创历史新高，近两年累计前移约3928名。2025年基准位次                        约1031名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年42人、2022年42人、2023年43人、2024年44人、2025年40人；2026年计划34人，较2025年减少6人                         ，缩招约15%。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，对位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第21–25名（2021年第25名、                        2022年第24名、2023年第25名、2024年第23名、2025年第21名、2026年第23名），属于全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为                        偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打，校方被指偏袒不作为），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音热度总排名第74位，评价为"一般"，短视                        频曝光量中等；2021–2025年投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科                         学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，其中3个A+，学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热（2024年），航空航天类虽无直接热度数据但属国家战略方向；天津市2026年                        高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，竞争加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，在天津招生占比约1.5%–2.4%（                        2021年18人占2.4%、2022年13人占1.5%、2024年13人占1.7%、2025年12人占2.0%），属于正常跨省招生比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1031名                        、2026年缩招15%以及天津市考生总数增加约14%带来的竞争加剧压力，三者大致相互抵消；学校顶尖层次和优势学科提供位次前移支撑，                        声誉偏负面有轻微后移影响。综合权衡后，预测2026年最低录取位次约938名，区间797–1079名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约938名，区间797–1079名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档材料类为核心稳保，一档航空航天类王牌专业可冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档电子信息类和计算机                        类虽位次门槛较低但社会热度极高，实际竞争可能激烈，建议作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 4269, 4459, 4959, 1843, and 1031 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated between 4269 and 4959, with an overall backward shift of about 700 places; starting from 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics, Chemistry (2 subjects mandatory)", the admission threshold significantly increased, and the ranking jumped to 1843; in 2025, it further advanced to 1031, a historical high, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3928 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1031; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin Comprehensive category: 42 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34, a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of about 15%. The reduction means fewer competitive slots, exerting pressure for a forward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 21st–25th in recent years (25th in 2021, 24th in 2022, 25th in 2023, 23rd in 2024, 21st in 2025, 23rd in 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students beaten by local criminal forces, the university accused of favoritism and inaction), which may have a slight negative impact on some students' application psychology; Douyin heat total ranking is 74th, rated as "average", with moderate short video exposure; there are no records of the university's enrollment gaps in the 2021–2025 abnormal admission files, indicating relatively stable admission trends; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 7 disciplines at A- or above, including 3 A+, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors continue to be highly popular (2024); although Aerospace has no direct popularity data, it is a national strategic direction; the total number of Tianjin 2026 college entrance examination candidates is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, intensifying competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, with a proportion of enrollment in Tianjin about 1.5%–2.4% (18 in 2021 accounting for 2.4%, 13 in 2022 accounting for 1.5%, 13 in 2024 accounting for 1.7%, 12 in 2025 accounting for 2.0%), which is a normal cross-province enrollment ratio, with no obvious regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1031, the 15% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the increased competition pressure from a 14% increase in Tianjin candidates, these three factors roughly offset each other; the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines provide support for a forward shift in ranking, while the slightly negative reputation has a minor backward effect. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 938, with a range of 797–1079.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 938, range 797–1079. If ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 Materials as a core stable choice; Tier 1 Aerospace flagship majors can be attempted (ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range); although Tier 3 Electronic Information and Computer majors have lower ranking thresholds, their social popularity is extremely high, and actual competition may be fierce, so they are recommended as safe choices.
